name: Customer Project Template
description: CE practice Tier 2 project template. Instantiate this for each customer that confirms a POC. Covers POC (4-6 weeks), Hyper-Care (90 days), and Steady-State phases.

required_custom_fields.note: After scaffolding this project, add all fields below via Asana UI: Project → Customize → Fields → Add Field. All GCA_GTM_ Stage/Health/Outcome/Risk/SalesMotion fields are TEXT type — enter allowed values as plain strings (see field descriptions in Asana for valid options).

updated_over_time.GCA_GTM_WAU Adoption %: Updated monthly from GCA admin console. Tracked in Steady-State phase.
updated_over_time.GCA_GTM_Customer Health: Text field. Values: 🟢 Green | 🟡 Yellow | 🔴 Red | ⚪ Not Started. Updated at 30/60/90-day checkpoints.
updated_over_time.GCA_GTM_Risk Flag: Text field. Values: None | At Risk | Blocked | Escalated | Going Cold. Updated when blockers arise.
updated_over_time.GCA_GTM_Stage: Text field. Values: POC | Hyper-Care | Steady-State. Updated at each lifecycle transition.

default_values_at_poc_start.note: All text strings — set directly on the task custom_fields payload using field GID as key.

tasks.name: ♦ POC Kickoff
tasks.notes: MILESTONE | Owner: CE | Timing: Day 1 | Convert to Milestone in Asana after creation.

tasks.name: POC environment provisioned (licenses/access)
tasks.notes: Owner: CE + Customer IT | Timing: Day 1-2 | Ensure GCA licenses are assigned and dev environments are accessible for the pilot group.

tasks.name: Opstree architect assigned & briefed
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 1 | Share customer context, POC scope, success criteria, and expected pilot group profile.

tasks.name: POC kickoff meeting with customer engineering
tasks.notes: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: Day 2-3 | Agenda: introductions, GCA overview, pilot group selection, timeline walkthrough, Q&A.

tasks.name: POC success criteria sign-off doc shared & agreed
tasks.notes: Owner: CE + Customer | Timing: Day 3-5 | Attach signed doc to this task. Capture: success metrics, pilot group size, exit criteria, decision timeline.

tasks.name: GCA plugin deployed to pilot group (10-20 devs)
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree + Customer IT | Timing: Day 5-7 | IDE plugin installed, authenticated, and validated for all pilot users. Confirm in GCA admin console.

tasks.name: Mid-POC check-in (blockers and feedback)
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 2 | Review adoption metrics, surface blockers, confirm timeline to POC completion.

tasks.name: Adoption metrics from POC collected
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 3 | Pull from GCA admin console: WAU, suggestion acceptance rate, daily active users. Update WAU Adoption % field.

tasks.name: POC results documented
tasks.notes: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: Week 3-4 | Document: usage stats vs success criteria, key wins, blockers resolved, go-forward recommendation.

tasks.name: Executive readout / go-forward recommendation
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 4-5 | Present POC results and recommendation to customer sponsor and economic buyer.

tasks.name: Commercial proposal submitted
tasks.notes: Owner: AE | Timing: Week 5 | CE to support with technical scope, pilot results, and licensing details.

tasks.name: Decision: Closed-Won / Closed-Lost
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 5-6 | Update Stage, Outcome, and Customer Health fields. If won: proceed to Hyper-Care. If lost: complete post-mortem.

tasks.name: ♦ POC Completion
tasks.notes: MILESTONE | Owner: CE | Timing: Week 4-6 | Convert to Milestone in Asana after creation.

tasks.name: ♦ Kickoff Complete
tasks.notes: MILESTONE | Owner: CE | Timing: Day 5 | Convert to Milestone in Asana after creation.

tasks.name: ♦ Plugin Deployed
tasks.notes: MILESTONE | Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 14 | Convert to Milestone in Asana after creation.

tasks.name: ♦ 30-Day Adoption Report
tasks.notes: MILESTONE | Owner: CE | Timing: Day 30 | Convert to Milestone in Asana after creation.

tasks.name: ♦ 60-Day Health Check
tasks.notes: MILESTONE | Owner: CE | Timing: Day 60 | Convert to Milestone in Asana after creation.

tasks.name: ♦ Graduation to Steady-State
tasks.notes: MILESTONE | Owner: CE | Timing: Day 90 | WAU >= 60% required. Convert to Milestone in Asana after creation.

tasks.name: [Kickoff] Internal handoff (CE to Opstree to TAM)
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 1 | Brief Opstree and TAM on customer context, deal details, POC results, and 90-day plan.

tasks.name: [Kickoff] Customer kickoff call
tasks.notes: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: Day 3 | Introductions, onboarding plan walkthrough, expectations setting, escalation path.

tasks.name: [Kickoff] Technical onboarding plan shared
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 5 | Deliver written onboarding plan to customer IT lead and champion.

tasks.name: [Kickoff] Admin console setup & license provisioning
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 7 | Configure GCA admin console, assign licenses, verify authentication.

tasks.name: [Kickoff] Admin sessions delivered (IT/admin team training)
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 7-14 | Train customer admins on GCA console management, policy configuration, and user management.

tasks.name: [Kickoff] Enablement sessions conducted (dev team onboarding)
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 14-30 | Developer onboarding sessions covering GCA features, prompt engineering, and best practices.

tasks.name: [Integration] IDE plugin deployment plan agreed with IT
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree + Customer IT | Timing: Day 7-10 | Document rollout approach, IT dependencies, and timeline for full team deployment.

tasks.name: [Integration] Pilot group rollout (10-20 devs)
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree + Customer IT | Timing: Day 14 | Full plugin installation and validation for pilot cohort. Validate in GCA console.

tasks.name: [Integration] VPC-SC / proxy configuration (if needed)
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 10-14 | Configure network routing for GCA in restricted environments (VPC Service Controls, proxy, allowlist).

tasks.name: [Integration] Coding standards & prompt guidance shared
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 14 | Share GCA usage guidelines, prompt engineering tips, and team-specific coding standards.

tasks.name: [Adoption] First adoption metrics collected
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 21 | Pull WAU and acceptance rate from GCA admin console. Update WAU Adoption % custom field.

tasks.name: [Adoption] Developer feedback session
tasks.notes: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: Day 21 | Structured feedback from pilot developers on blockers, wins, and feature requests.

tasks.name: [Adoption] Enablement workshop delivered
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 28 | Hands-on workshop for full dev team covering advanced GCA features and use cases.

tasks.name: [Adoption] 30-day adoption report
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 30 | Report on WAU adoption vs target. Share with customer sponsor and internal leadership.

tasks.name: [Adoption] Broader rollout (full team)
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Day 35-45 | Expand GCA access from pilot to full developer organisation. Monitor for issues.

tasks.name: [Adoption] 60-day health check
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 60 | Review adoption metrics and overall health with customer champion. Update Customer Health field.

tasks.name: [Adoption] Blockers resolved (policy / proxy / UX)
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Ongoing | Track and resolve any adoption blockers raised by developers. Log resolution in task comments.

tasks.name: [Graduation] WAU adoption >= 60% confirmed
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 75 | Validate adoption threshold met from GCA admin console. Green light for graduation to Steady-State.

tasks.name: [Graduation] First QBR scheduled
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 80 | Set QBR date with customer sponsor. Confirm agenda: adoption metrics, wins, roadmap, expansion.

tasks.name: [Graduation] Opstree ongoing scope agreed
tasks.notes: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: Day 85 | Define Opstree involvement for Steady-State phase (ad-hoc vs retainer).

tasks.name: [Graduation] Update Stage field to Steady-State
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 90 | Update Stage custom field on this project from Hyper-Care to Steady-State.

tasks.name: [Monthly] Monthly adoption metrics pull
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: 1st of each month | RECURRING — pull WAU from GCA admin console. Update WAU Adoption % field.

tasks.name: [Monthly] Champion check-in call
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Monthly | RECURRING — 30-min sync with customer champion on adoption signals, asks, and blockers.

tasks.name: [Monthly] Update Customer Health & WAU Adoption % fields
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Monthly | RECURRING — update both custom fields based on latest metrics and champion feedback.

tasks.name: [Weekly] Watch for WAU drop greater than 10%
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree | Timing: Weekly | RECURRING — flag to CE if week-on-week adoption drops materially. Investigate root cause.

tasks.name: [QBR] Pull usage data from GCA admin console
tasks.notes: Owner: Opstree | Timing: 2 weeks before QBR | Export usage stats for QBR deck: WAU trend, acceptance rate, active users by team.

tasks.name: [QBR] Draft QBR deck
tasks.notes: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: 1 week before QBR | Cover: usage stats vs targets, wins, developer feedback, roadmap, asks from customer.

tasks.name: [QBR] QBR review call with sponsor / leadership
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Quarterly | Deliver QBR and capture all action items during call. Record meeting if permitted.

tasks.name: [QBR] Capture & enter QBR action items in Asana
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Day of QBR | Create tasks in this project for every customer action item raised during the QBR.

tasks.name: [Expansion] Expansion signal identified
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: As identified | Log expansion opportunity (new team, new use case, seat expansion). Create pre-sales task in CE Pipeline.

tasks.name: [Expansion] Expansion discovery call
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: As identified | Qualify the expansion scope, ARR potential, and timeline.

tasks.name: [Expansion] Commercial expansion discussion
tasks.notes: Owner: AE + CE | Timing: As identified | Hand off expansion opportunity to AE for commercial motion.

tasks.name: [Renewal] Renewal date logged in Next Key Date field
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: Day of contract | Set Renewal Date custom field and Next Key Date on this project.

tasks.name: [Renewal] 90-day pre-renewal health check
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: 90 days before renewal | Review health, adoption trend, and champion sentiment. Flag any renewal risk early.

tasks.name: [Renewal] Renewal risk assessment — update Health field
tasks.notes: Owner: CE | Timing: 90 days before renewal | Set Customer Health field. If Red: escalate to manager and AE immediately.

tasks.name: [Renewal] Renewal confirmed / at-risk escalated
tasks.notes: Owner: CE + AE | Timing: Before renewal date | Confirm renewal signed or escalate risk with documented action plan.
